/usr/bin/c++ -std=c++17 -pthread -march=native -fno-builtin-malloc -fno-builtin-calloc -fno-builtin-realloc -fno-builtin-free -faligned-new=64 -g CMakeFiles/test_pg_bridge.dir/test_pg_bridge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_pg_bridge.dir/__/pg_blinkhash/src/blinkhash_core.cpp.o -o test_pg_bridge  ../lib/libblinkhash.a ../wal/libblinkhash_wal.a -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/liburing.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libtbb.so.12.11
